info.title: WSF API
info.description: Woven Sovereignty Fabric trust-plane API: trust tokens, sealed envelopes, cloud-credential brokering, and the receipt ledger. All signatures are ML-DSA-87 and verify off-host.

post.summary: Issue a signed trust token for a subject within a tenant.
Verify a token's signature, revocation status, and expiry.
Mint a narrower child token from a parent (fails closed on any widening).
Seal a payload into an envelope (Transit-wrapped data key + provenance thread).
Unseal an envelope for a token-authorized op.
Exchange a verified token for ephemeral, scoped cloud credentials.

get.summary: Query the receipt ledger by correlation field/value (tenant-scoped; global auditors read across tenants).
Export the ML-DSA-signed evidence pack over the full ledger (global auditors only; verifies offline).

403.description: Principal is not an enrolled global auditor.
